description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin constructed from horizontal planks with a weathered, natural finish. The front facade features a set of double wooden doors and a single rectangular window with a multi-pane design, both framed by the same aged wood. Above the door and window is a blank, raised signboard, suggesting a possible commercial or communal use. The cabin sits elevated on short supports and is accessed by a simple wooden porch with steps leading up to it. The roof is a single-sloped shed style, covered in matching wooden planks, and the sides and rear are unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall appearance is functional and sturdy, suitable for use in a rural or frontier urban setting.
description: A small, weathered wooden cabin with a shed roof, front porch, double doors, and a single window, exuding a rustic, utilitarian charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors, a single window, a raised signboard, and a wooden porch with steps.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain wooden siding and the edge of the porch extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a featureless wooden wall and the sloped shed roof.
description_view_3: Right side view with plain siding and the porch visible extending from the front.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof constructed from wooden planks, single slope with no overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: one medium-sized rectangular window on the front facade, positioned to the right of the doors, with a multi-pane design and no symmetrical grouping
attribute_door_placement: one set of double doors centered on the front facade, directly beneath the signboard and adjacent to the window
